title: Bottled Italian Air
transcript:
Get a whiff of this sensational souvenir.
For a cool $11, you too can take home a breezy can of air.
Yes, air from Italy's Lake Como.
Communications company Italy Communica says it has bottled 400 millimeters of 100% authentic air
from the super trendy tourist destination.
Some may call it a gimmicky gift, but hey...
it is gonna fit in your carry-on.
